to all the artists that i listened to, thank you

look! i made a map of the world
- the world doesn't look like that
exactly. wanna see how it works?

an adventure game where the player only has one available action at a time. the character they're playing has a range of options available to them but unlike traditional point click adventure games, the player can't freely choose between them. they cycle through like tetris blocks (maybe even using similar semi randomness, maybe there's also a preview of the next action). [environmental](environmental) feedback for every click should be meaningful enough that players are freed from the click everything antistrategy - that may require objects' interactivity to toggle off for some actions, as communicated by shifting anticipations

the main idea is to ratchet up the preciousness of interacting with the world, then to riff off of these core mechanics in deeply satisfying ways. for instance, while each character in the point and click adventure might have a limited and particular set of actions, the player would get the chance to cycle through them to experience different powers and personalities and to build different relationships

i shit rhymes with sick lines
thick lines
you could see my secrets
if you had the stomach to dig my
fecis
i mean my thesis
i mean pieces of the stresses
i’ve eaten digested
this is what i’m left with
you could haul it all off
at no cost, be ya own boss
just sit here while i go on and go off
i’m bout to put a load down that you could load off
if you want it, if not let’s just drop it
it ain’t knowledge, it’s not polished
just some shit i was thinkin bout
before i strayed off topic
stay off the top in real life
but i’m real nice
put a lotta work in words
so you can observe what it feel like
to feel like
put a lotta worth in words
that’s how i first heard what it feel like
to feel like

talk is cheap
and we all can only reap what we sow
so i know we all counterfeit
too much paper on all us
trust can't account for it




i'm walkin out here like i ain't worry bout nothin
and i cherish the feelin
cuz when it's time for huntin i get tired concealin
all the fear that i'm dealin with


i was born in a barn but i ain't special
star material but i ain't metal
you shine, i grow, root, stem, and petal
[...]
grew up a boy in a bubble time to schedule my special
i been runnin like water woadie watch me chase gold medal
now i make waves like guitar and a pedal
[...]
i was bored at a bar so i ordered the special
it came out on fire, why am i testing my mettle
quiet the questions then i'm pressing the pedal
[...]
i was flat like a board til art made me feel spatial
god knows like a liar, wish i'd never made you
cuttin my cords how this gepetto repaid you
[...]
now this is the part where i depart in a spaceship
crowd watch from the ground wonder how i made it
frankly i ran up the bill and y'all paid it. thank you

but i made drugs that go to kids and hope nobody notices

https://mobile.twitter.com/captain_mrs/status/1544663154654957574

phone keys wallet
everything i got that's all it
why do you want it
you can't be me i'm not an object

i'm la bron
y'all small minded thinking i got all the titles i could ever want
tryin to put one more on
greatest of all time
y'all saw what he did to toronto, watch me on the six
while drake laughing with lonzo, i'm tweaking my own mix
i don't play, i'm a monstar
i produce my own hits
i don't pop, i'm a rap star
and i do it like this
with pop and a back step
and stupid ass hops
vision and foresight
to own the shoe when it drops
i'm not what you thought that i'd be when you guessed
you were wrong but it's fine, man. i been doing the best
almost ruined the sport
by moving the product through my own court
now i moving the court
cuz i got shit to do in the morning
and i don't quit til two in the morning
and i wake up renewed in the morning
so i just keep on keep on going
and i just keep on keep on growing
and y'all can see so y'all be knowing
when i say greatest, y'all say who is
if it ain't me, i'm a master their strength and use it
call trump a bum cuz the dude is
y'all bout to watch me run the us

my mission is fission, start the first incision in my heart
the part that’s hardest to split apart
i’m kidding, i’m in the kitchen with a cart full of fixins
it’s time to start mixin
my music is fusion, my imagination
is infatuated with evolution
survival of whatever fits the rhyme scheme
i mean, have you ever seen an mc as nice as me

inside the outside. outside the inside

the scars on my elbows from catching the ball at the park fence. the stories i tell so it all starts to make sense. the goodbyes and hellos i use to connect. the kangols and shelltoes i wore for respect. the angels and devils, my war for respect

how do you get to just cause from just cuz
how do you get to crenshaw from santa monica
it’s all connected
everything we do gets all collected
in a big knot then bang
what’s up with that thang
i wanna know, how does it hang
how you get from the king’s english to this new jack slang
how you get from filthy rich to mlk
how you get from you need to know everything about me
to there’s some shit you can’t say
how’d we get to that block from national security
how’d we get to cell blocks from natural infirmities
how’d they get between us from scratching our insecurities
how do we get to the next step without imagining possibilities
in a big knot then bang

lemme tell you who i am so you can see where i am going
cuz i’ll end up where i’m at but i won’t get there alone



basically, i take me off the list. [everything](everything) i think is important is framed by me. i don't need a whole separate entry for myself. [here](here)'s [billy](billy)'s [amber](amber) and billy's [noble](noble), and billy's freedom and billy's justice. billy's billy. it would be insane to say my name over and over again. and since [every](every) word i have is billy's, it basically cuts my time thinking in half. so i take my name off the list. my concerns are covered

[work](work) then is to tend to gardens, to flowers, to weeds, to music, to amber and noble, to community, to words, to hours, to people, to children, to friendships, to loves, powers

sometimes, though. i fall into the obvious trap. i forget what is mine. what i own. i deny myself 3 times and a billion more. i say this is mine or that is mine like it isn't all mine. like i don't own every single thing i and i alone have

this isn't too say any of us get to control what enters our lives. only that this one is mine, all mine. and i

 '
some of us out here buyin acuras
cuz others advertise acuras
free cuz it rhymes with black and back of the
i'm in the back of the black subaru
ain't have to, it's what i knew to do
flippin old til its new to you
flippin ohs into oooohs and it's beautiful
flippin birds into doves and they flew to you
flippin shoves into rolls and it's cool to you

like i'm a fool for the drum

make me an offer i can’t refuse

i like writers who dribble and shoot with both hands
and make crosscourt chest passes
i like people who live by givin death access
you can’t get to the basket if you ain’t fearless
i ain’t peerless like nikki and jay but i got my own spirit
talk to it when i hear it
walk through fire to be near it
this body, let the motherfucker burn
i need the energy
y’all can measure me when i’m ashes in an urn
i ain’t the enemy, but don’t expect you to see that
i know there’s a lotta noise in the feedback loop
and a lotta foul shit in my feedbag too



i ain't power hungry, 'm already powerful
it's time to work
put down the knife and fork
spit out a mouthful to ask who could use my support
how are you
eating
how are you keeping food on your family plate
wait, take a bite, i'm being rude. we can continue
when you can concentrate
i ain't trying to win or offend you
we got a lot to plot and a plot to tend to

match my flow with my focus
when i go slow it's
cuz i already know what
i'm trying to say
when i pick up the pace
then words get replaced
with streams of consciousness
that come to take me place
is this who i am or is it just where i'm at
i keep coming back to the fact
that i been someone else somewhere else
someone help me understand
cuz i'm stuck under something
i can't move with my hands
i been building my strength
i thought i had what it takes
i thought i caught all the breaks
i thought i made my escape
i thought wrong
i got got
got knocked down
got back up
knocked down again
i got up again
knocked down again
it's disheartening
this ain't who i thought i was this ain't where i thought i'd be
that's why it's so haunting cuz it doesn't make sense to me
